title: Improve calibration and marker defaults
description: 1. Add default marker configuration for new maps. 2. Expand projector_calibration.py to include PPI calibration and camera pose estimation (extrinsics) using markers of known height. Handle imprecise marker placement by using the homography to find the base (X, Y) of detected markers.

title: Design Aruco-based token tracking
description: Create a design document in features/ for tracking tokens using Aruco markers. Address elevation/parallax, grid snapping (1x1, nxn), PC/NPC classification, and continuous scanning resilience.
